content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I can now identify all the neighbour atoms of atom index 15 (C).

**Results:**

**Atom 15 (C) has the following neighbour atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 14 | N |
| 16 | C |
| 18 | H |

**geomconf_index:** 8830

**Explanation:**
From the zoomed views of atom C:15, I can clearly see three covalent bonds (indicated by thick cylindrical connections) connecting to:
1. **N:14** (blue sphere) - Nitrogen atom
2. **C:16** (yellow/gold sphere) - Carbon atom
3. **H:18** (white sphere) - Hydrogen atom

This makes chemical sense as carbon typically forms 4 bonds. In this case, C:15 appears to be part of an aromatic ring system (a heterocycle with nitrogen) where it forms single bonds with N:14 and C:16, and a single bond with H:18 (with the fourth bond being part of the aromatic pi system).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 15, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
